name: get_nearest_city_data
description: Retrieve real-time air quality and weather data for the nearest monitored city to a given GPS coordinate. If no coordinates are provided, the API auto-detects location via IP geolocation. Returns current AQI (US and China standards), main pollutant, PM2.5 concentration, temperature, humidity, pressure, wind speed/direction, and weather icon.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude of the location. If omitted, IP geolocation is used.

parameters.name: lon
parameters.description: Longitude of the location. If omitted, IP geolocation is used.
